title: West Marshtomp Cobblemon
description: Modpack for West Marshtomp community, featuring Cobblemon and sidemods.
body: Modpack for West Marshtomp community, featuring Cobblemon and sidemods. Focusing on a Cobblemon-centric playthrough, with the most recent version of Cobblemon, as well as trainers, gyms, and challenges! New versions including Tech mods per request, Create and Immersive Engineering
